description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a dark green or black glass body and a gold foil-wrapped neck and cap, resembling a champagne or sparkling wine bottle. The bottle features a prominent rectangular label on the front, with visible text and decorative elements, and a smaller label on the back. The glass body is opaque, preventing visibility of the contents inside. The gold foil extends from the cap down to the shoulder of the bottle, giving it a celebratory and premium appearance. The overall shape is cylindrical with a gently sloping shoulder and a narrow neck, typical of bottles designed to hold carbonated beverages. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation on the exterior.
description: A tall, dark glass bottle with a gold foil-wrapped neck and a prominent front label, resembling a champagne or sparkling wine bottle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label and gold foil neck.
description_view_1: Rear view with no visible label, highlighting the smooth, dark glass body and gold foil cap.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the side label and the transition between the glass and foil.
description_view_3: Front view with the main label clearly visible and centered.
attribute_label_or_branding: A large, rectangular, white label with black and gold text and decorative elements is present on the front. A smaller label is visible on the back or side. The labels are centered and contrast with the dark bottle.
